text: As I stand on the threshold between the gathering room and the more vividly colored exhibit hall, I feel a sense of anticipation tinged with curiosity. The presence of others engaged in quiet conversation reminds me how human connection unfolds in shared spaces. Now, the bright, immersive display of the R+D wall draws me in, an invitation to contemplate the ways innovation shapes our existence. I’m intrigued—eager to lose myself in these ideas, yet aware of the slight disorientation that accompanies new environments. My mind hovers between observation and participation, thoughtful and quietly excited.
